**Analyzing service schedule**

The information indicates that service will be regular until 8:30 AM and again from 5 PM to 8 PM. It mentions a public transport strike that may last 24 hours, but only certain times will have regular service. The phrase “fino alle 8,30” and “dalle 17 alle 20” suggests disruptions might occur outside those hours. I need to clarify that the strike starts tomorrow, but I don't have an exact timestamp.
